requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IS 302 Series for Household Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用电器IS 302系列
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用電器IS 302系列

summary.en: India uses the IS 302 household-appliance safety series as a core technical basis for electrical safety of household and similar appliances, including refrigerator-relevant general safety requirements and particular requirements where applicable. Where Indian law, BIS orders, QCO scope, licence/registration conditions, or importer obligations specify an Indian Standard, that standard is compulsory for in-scope products. Key areas include protection against electric shock, insulation, leakage current, earthing, temperature rise, abnormal operation, mechanical strength, supply cord, marking, and instructions.
summary.zh: 印度使用IS 302家用电器安全系列作为家用和类似用途器具电气安全的核心技术依据，包括与电冰箱相关的通用安全要求及适用的特殊要求。凡印度法律、BIS命令、QCO范围、许可证/注册条件或进口商义务指定印度标准的，该标准对范围内产品具有强制性。核心项目包括防触电、绝缘、泄漏电流、接地、温升、非正常运行、机械强度、电源线、标识和说明书。
summary.zht: 印度使用IS 302家用電器安全系列作為家用和類似用途器具電氣安全的核心技術依據，包括與電冰箱相關的通用安全要求及適用的特殊要求。凡印度法律、BIS命令、QCO範圍、許可證/登記條件或進口商義務指定印度標準的，該標準對範圍內產品具有強制性。核心項目包括防觸電、絕緣、洩漏電流、接地、溫升、非正常運行、機械強度、電源線、標識和說明書。

standards_or_laws: Bureau of Indian Standards Act, 2016 — legal basis for BIS conformity assessment
BIS Conformity Assessment Regulations, 2018 — licence, registration, and surveillance framework
IS 302 series — household and similar electrical appliance safety standard compulsory where specified for products within QCO/BIS scope

summary.en: China's refrigerator safety evidence is commonly built around CCC and GB 4706.13 with GB 4706.1. The Chinese test basis is related to the IEC 60335 family but includes China-specific deviations, marking, plug, supply, and certification controls. India requires India-specific evidence and cannot rely on the existence of a CCC certificate alone.
summary.zh: 中国电冰箱安全证据通常围绕CCC、GB 4706.13及GB 4706.1建立。中国试验依据与IEC 60335系列相关，但包含中国特定偏差、标识、插头、电源及认证控制。印度需要印度专用证据，不能仅依赖CCC证书的存在。
summary.zht: 中國電冰箱安全證據通常圍繞CCC、GB 4706.13及GB 4706.1建立。中國試驗依據與IEC 60335系列相關，但包含中國特定偏差、標識、插頭、電源及認證控制。印度需要印度專用證據，不能僅依賴CCC證書的存在。

standards_or_laws: China CCC framework — domestic appliance safety certification route
GB 4706.1 and GB 4706.13 — Chinese appliance safety test bases

gap.en: The gap is not only test clauses; it includes India plug and supply assumptions, marking language, importer identity, rated voltage/frequency, instruction manual content, critical component approvals, factory quality controls, and surveillance response. If a CB Scheme report exists, it may reduce engineering re-test scope, but the report must still be reviewed against IS 302 deviations and BIS acceptance practice.
gap.zh: 差距不只是试验条款，还包括印度插头和供电假设、标识语言、进口商身份、额定电压/频率、说明书内容、关键部件批准、工厂质量控制及监督响应。如已有CB体系报告，可能减少工程复测范围，但仍须按IS 302偏差和BIS接受实践进行审查。
gap.zht: 差距不只是試驗條款，還包括印度插頭和供電假設、標識語言、進口商身份、額定電壓/頻率、說明書內容、關鍵部件批准、工廠品質控制及監督回應。如已有CB體系報告，可能減少工程複測範圍，但仍須按IS 302偏差和BIS接受實務進行審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Indian law, BIS orders, licence conditions, registration conditions, QCO scope, or import obligations require electrical safety demonstration. Specified Indian Standards are compulsory for products within QCO/BIS scope.
mandatory_status.cn: CCC safety evidence is China domestic evidence and does not automatically satisfy India IS 302 review or BIS acceptance.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build an India electrical safety file around IS 302 review, India markings, importer details, and BIS acceptance practice. Chinese CCC/GB 4706 evidence can inform the technical review but should not be treated as a substitute for India-facing safety evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】应围绕IS 302审查、印度标识、进口商信息及BIS接受实践建立印度电气安全文件。中国CCC/GB 4706证据可支持技术审查，但不应被视为面向印度安全证据的替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】應圍繞IS 302審查、印度標識、進口商資訊及BIS接受實務建立印度電氣安全文件。中國CCC/GB 4706證據可支持技術審查，但不應被視為面向印度安全證據的替代。
